CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-09-2025 Continued To Mar-19-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Amended MOTION TO TRANSFER
Off Calendar Jan-29-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Daniel Garrett-Steinman, Esq. 415-996-7823 for Plaintiff.
Donald Mooney, Esq. 530-758-2377 for Defendant.

ARGUED. Mr. Mooney contests transfer fees. The Court shares its comments. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANTs SIERRA CLUB, CENTER FOR BIOLOGICAL DIVERSITY, INC., CALIFORNIA NATIVE PLANT SOCIETY,and FRIENDS OF THE RIVER's Amended MOTION TO TRANSFER.

SIERRA CLUB, CENTER FOR BIOLOGICAL DIVERSITY, INC., CALIFORNIA NATIVE PLANT SOCIETY; and FRIENDS OF THE RIVER's ("Moving Defendants") motion to transfer venue under chapter 1 of Title for of the CCP is GRANTED. Good cause appearing, this action is transferred to the Superior Court of the State of California for the County of Stanislaus ("Stanislaus Court") given that all claims arise from and are directly related to Sierra Club, et al. v. Del Puerto Water District, Stanislaus County Superior Court, Case No. CV-20-005193 ("Del Puerto litigation"), a matter adjudicated in the Stanislaus Court and the Stanislaus Court is a proper venue for the claims. (See CCP section 395(a).) Plaintiff Daniel Paul Garrett-Steinman's request that this court retain jurisdiction over motions set for or to be set for hearing in February 2025, is denied. When a matter is transferred, a court surrenders jurisdiction to the receiving court. All pending matters will have to be noticed for hearing in the Stansilaus Court once the transfer is complete. Moving Defendants to pay the court fees and costs attendant to the transfer.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
